docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BAPTISTA, LUIS F. AS TO DEFENDANT HYATT REGENCY HOTEL. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
